name: cms-platform-e2e
description: Playwright e2e harness for cms-platform sites. Self-contained: a consuming site checks the platform out into .cms-platform/ and runs `cd .cms-platform/e2e && npm ci && npx playwright test` against its deployed URLs (passed via CMS_BASE_URL / CMS_PROD_URL / CMS_APEX / CMS_REPO / TARGET env vars).
